headline: Nvidia Wants Your Next House to be a Mini Data Center
summary: The Suburb as Server Farm NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) wants the next AI factory to sit in your garage. Through a partnership with California startup Span, the chipmaker is teaming with homebuilder PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) to deploy residential “XFRA units,” small data centers bolted onto new houses that tap unused grid capacity through Span’s smart panels. The pitch ... Nvidia Wants Your Next House to be a Mini Data Center
